result:
**Compressed Operational Context (2026-07-19)**

**Infrastructure Scope:** 15 services (billing-worker, report-builder, session-manager, webhook-relay, search-indexer, cache-warmer, audit-logger, metrics-collector, ingest-api, user-profile-service, scheduler-core, payment-gateway, notification-daemon, export-pipeline, auth-service) across 6 environments (dev, QA, production, staging, blue/green/canary).

**Operations Volume:** 130+ instances executed (60+ morning + 70+ afternoon/evening). Types: scaling, upgrades, migrations, patches, restarts, reconfigurations, rollbacks, health-checks, drains, redeploys, pauses, downgrades.

**Outcome Distribution:**
- Clean completion: ~40%
- Ahead of schedule: ~20%
- Manual retry required: ~10% (ingest-api blue/staging, audit-logger staging, webhook-relay green/staging, cache-warmer prod, export-pipeline dev/green, session-manager green, billing-worker canary)
- Longer than expected: ~15% (payment-gateway dev/prod/staging, report-builder blue, search-indexer dev, webhook-relay blue, notification-daemon blue)
- Warnings emitted: ~15% (audit-logger prod, notification-daemon dev, metrics-collector QA, export-pipeline green, user-profile-service staging)

**Key Results:**
- Memory pressure reduced: auth-service, session-manager, metrics-collector, payment-gateway (staging/green), notification-daemon, export-pipeline staging
- Error rates stabilized: export-pipeline, notification-daemon, search-indexer, webhook-relay, scheduler-core
- Alerts cleared: ingest-api dev, billing-worker canary
- Queue depths recovered to zero post-retry; CPU baseline within 1 hour
- All health checks passed or recovered; no customer impact
- Pager quiet throughout

**Patterns:**
- Retry-prone: ingest-api redeployments, export-pipeline drains, session-manager resumption (state-dependent)
- Threshold reviews flagged for next week: payment-gateway, notification-daemon, cache-warmer, search-indexer, metrics-collector, user-profile-service
- Configuration tidying: report-builder blue, auth-service prod
- Documentation updated: audit-logger drain, notification-daemon redeployment, scheduler-core downgrade
- Postmortem notes added to runbooks for auth-service, ingest-api, session-manager, audit-logger, export-pipeline

**Status:** Routine maintenance cycle complete. All systems stable. No escalations. Ready to continue.
